name: header
visual_summary: A reusable header component that can be used to display a group of navigation links at the top of an application or page. It can contain text or icons and can be configured with different styles and themes.
generation_prompt:
Create a production-ready navbar component with the following characteristics:

Name: header
Description: A reusable header component that can be used to display a group of navigation links at the top of an application or page. It can contain text or icons and can be configured with different styles and themes.
Style: themeable, customizable
Interactions: clickable, responsive
Tags: header, navbar, navigation

Requirements:
- Works in React with TypeScript by default but adaptable to Vue, Svelte, or plain HTML/CSS
- Uses Tailwind CSS for styling
- Fully accessible with ARIA labels and keyboard navigation
- Responsive and mobile-friendly
- No external dependencies beyond React and Tailwind unless necessary
- Include all necessary imports
- Export as default with sensible prop types

Generate clean production-ready code only. No explanations.
Reference implementation (adapt don't copy):
